revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:細川神社]] {{Expand Japanese|細川神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hosokawa Shrine | native_name = 細川神社 | image = Hosolawajinja01.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hosokawa Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.855738|135.43598}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hosokawa Shrine'''|細川神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11498550|ltq=Q11498550|qid=Q11498550|1=List of Shikinaisha in Settsu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 37 ** P155: {{ill|Q11567184|ltq=Q11567184|qid=Q11567184|1=Inatsuhiko Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Tarumi Shrine|lt=Tarumi Shrine|ja|垂水神社 (吹田市)|qid=Q11425829|1=Tarumi Shrine (Q11425829)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q817965|ltq=Q817965|qid=Q817965|1=Ikeda, Osaka}} * {{ill|Q864163|ltq=Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}} * {{ill|Teshima district|lt=Teshima district|ja|豊島郡 (大阪府)|zh|豐島郡 (大阪府)|qid=Q11633558|1=Teshima district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.855738|135.43598}} == image (P18) == * Hosolawajinja01.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181057 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * Çhapaan|hak|Ngi̍t-pún|ha|Japan|haw|Iāpana|he|יפן|henews|תגית:יפן|hequote|יפן|hevoyage|יפן|hif|Japan|hi|जापान|hiquote|जापान|hivoyage|जापान|hr|Japan|hsb|Japanska|ht|Japon|hu|Japán|hunews|Kategória:Japán|hy|Ճապոնիա|hyw|Ճափոն|ia|Japon|iba|Jipun|id|Jepang|idquote|Jepang|idvoyage|Jepang|ie|Japan|igl|Japan|ig|Japan|ik|Nippan|ilo|Hapon|inh|Японехье|io|Japonia|is|Japan|it|Giappone|itnews|Categoria:Giappone|itquote|Giappone|itvoyage|Giappone|iu|ᔭᐹᓐ|jam|Japan|ja|日本|janews|カテゴリ:日本|jaquote|日本|javoyage|日本|jbo|pongu'e|jv|Jepang|kaa|Yaponiya|kab|Yapan|ka|იაპონია|kbd|Япон|kbp|Sapɔŋ|kcg|Ja̱pan|kge|Jopang|kg|Japan|ki|Japan|kk|Жапония|km|ជប៉ុន|knc|Japan|kn|ಜಪಾನ್|koi|Ниппон|ko|일본|konews|분류:일본|koquote|일본|krc|Джапония|ksh|Japan|ks|جاپان|ku|Japon|kv|Япония|kw|Nihon|ky|Жапония|lad|Japon|la|Iaponia|lbe|Япония|lb|Japan|lez|Япония|lfn|Nion|lg|Japan|lij|Giappon|li|Japan|lld|Iapan|lmo|Giapon|ln|Zapɔ́|lo|ປະເທດຍີ່ປຸ່ນ|ltg|Japoneja|lt|Japonija|lv|Japāna|mad|Jeppang|mai|जापान|map_bms|Jepang|mdf|Японмастор|mg|Japàna|mhr|Японий|min|Japang|mi|Nipono|mk|Јапонија|ml|ജപ്പാൻ|mni|ꯖꯄꯥꯟ|mn|Япон|mrj|Япони|mr|जपान|ms|Jepun|msquote|Jepun|mt|Ġappun|mwl|Japon|myv|Япония Мастор|my|ဂျပန်နိုင်ငံ|mzn|جاپون|nap|Giappone|nds_nl|Japan|nds|Japan|ne|जापान|new|जापान|nia|Jepang|nl|Japan|nlnews|Categorie:Japan|nlvoyage|Japan|nn|Japan|nov|Japan|no|Japan|nqo|ߗ߭ߊߔߐ߲߫|nrm|Japon|nr|Japane|nso|Japane|nv|Binááʼádaałtsʼózí Dineʼé ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ほそかわんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4120905003255 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '大阪府池田市吉田町１', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:細川神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11605965}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hosokawa Shrine |画像 =[[File:Hosolawajinja02.jpg|270px|]]
Haiden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ikeda|Q817965|qid=Q817965|1=Ikeda, Osaka}} Yoshida-chō 1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Hosokawa Mizu-Ōkami
{{ill|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-Kami|Q10881556|qid=Q10881556|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = {{ill|lt=Tenpyō|Q1199879|qid=Q1199879|1=Tenpyō}} era ({{ill|lt=729|Q23561|qid=Q23561|1=729}}-{{ill|lt=748|Q23621|qid=Q23621|1=748}}) |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=July 13|Q2687|qid=Q2687|1=July 13}} (annual festival), {{ill|lt=October 23|Q2958|qid=Q2958|1=October 23}} (autumn festival) |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Osaka|label=Hosokawa Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} [[File:Hosolawajinja01.jpg|thumb|right|250px|{{center|Torii}}]] '''Hosokawa Shrine''' (ほそかわんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in Yoshida-chō, {{ill|lt=Ikeda|Q817965|qid=Q817965|1=Ikeda, Osaka}}, {{ill|lt=Osaka Prefecture|Q122723|qid=Q122723|1=Osaka Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} of {{ill|lt=Toyoshima District (Osaka)|Q11633558|qid=Q11633558|lt=Toyoshima District|1=Teshima district}}, {{ill|lt=Settsu Province|Q864163|qid=Q864163|1=Settsu Province}}. Its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *Hosokawa Mizu-Ōkami *{{ill|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-Kami|Q10881556|qid=Q10881556|qid=Q10881556|lt=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto|1=Isotakeru-no-Mikoto}} *:The {{ill|lt=Jinja Meisaichō|Q11590704|qid=Q11590704|1=jinjameisaichou}} says “deity unknown”; ''Osaka Prefecture Historic Sites / Scenic Places / Natural Monuments'' gives Hosokawa Suijin, {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|qid=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}, and {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}. ===History=== The founding date is unclear, but ''Osaka-fu Zenshi'' says it predates the Tenpyō era (729-748). From the medieval period onward, its location (identification site) was unknown, but ''{{ill|lt=Settsu Meisho Zue|Q11498549|qid=Q11498549|1=Settsu Meisho Zue}}'' records: “Hosokawa Shrine is on Jionji-yama in Yoshida Village. It is an Engishiki shrine, now called {{ill|lt=Bishamonten|Q866315|qid=Q866315|1=Vaiśravaṇa}}, and is the inner sanctuary of Kuan-ji.” Until {{ill|lt=Namikawa Seisho|Q6563872|qid=Q6563872|1=Namikawa Seisho}} identified it as a Shikinaisha in the {{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} era (1716-1735), it had been transmitted as the inner sanctuary of {{ill|lt=Kuan-ji (Ikeda)|Q11369269|qid=Q11369269|lt=Kuan-ji|1=Kyuan-ji Temple}}. * Ranked as {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} in Meiji 5. * On September 19, Meiji 40, merged Tenmangū of Fushio, Susa-no-o of Mon-dō in Nakagawara, Hachiman Shrine of Furu-e Shimogaito, and Atago Shrine of Kubo in Higashiyama. * Designated as shinsen-heihaku offering shrine in December Meiji 41Eitarō Ikuzawa, ''Shikinaisha Chōsa Hōkoku Vol.5'' (1977) {{全国書誌番号|78005760}}. ===Precinct shrines=== *Kōtai Shrine *Ōkuni Shrine === Access === *From {{ill|lt=Ikeda Station (Osaka)|Q866156|qid=Q866156|lt=Ikeda Station|1=Ikeda Station (Osaka)}} on the {{ill|lt=Hankyu Takarazuka Main Line|Q3832859|qid=Q3832859|1=Hankyu Takarazuka Main Line}}, take Hankyu Bus toward Kuan-ji, get off at Higashiyama, about 10 minutes on foot. ===Sources=== {{脚注ヘルプ}} ===Related items=== *{{ill|lt=Kuan-ji (Ikeda)|Q11369269|qid=Q11369269|lt=Kuan-ji|1=Kyuan-ji Temple}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hosokawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hosokawa Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Osaka Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Ikeda, Osaka]] [[Category:池田市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Settsu Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Osaka Prefecture]]
